description: Load or reload a Skill manifest after edits and validate that Locus can read it. Use after modifying a Skill file so parse or metadata errors are surfaced before reporting completion.

name.description: Skill dir name or package id, for example `asset-audit`, `unity/asset-audit`, or `studio.tools.asset-audit`.

source.description: Skill source. Defaults to `project`; use `app` for built-in Skills or app-installed packages.
